objective: Replace one clean-checkout-impossible Market CI command with the existing hard real-CLI prerequisite conformance module and make no other change.
executable_blocker: The composed private Market tree is 2933-tests green, but exact CI deterministically stops before pytest because the default reality-loop dry-run requires runtime prerequisite state absent by design from a clean checkout.

required: replace only the reality-loop clean-checkout invocation and its display name
run the existing focused real-CLI prerequisite conformance module as a hard gate
retain all other workflow triggers permissions actions environments commands and ordering
retain full-suite pytest as a later independent hard gate
retain the exact composed Market source and test tree
forbidden: runtime test script config lockfile dependency contract or other workflow edit
skip xfail continue-on-error shell fallback conditional bypass or advisory conversion
new fixture prerequisite state report ledger dataset private payload or generated artifact
network external mutation live authority or deployment

acceptance_commands: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m pytest -q -p no:cacheprovider tests/test_paper_reality_loop_cli.py
exact one-file one-step diff plus no skip fallback continue-on-error private-locator network or live-authority scan
rollback: Agent 0 discards the single workflow-only worker commit and deletes the isolated branch/worktree. The composed Market source and test tree, original dirty checkout, runtime state, scientific artifacts, public Bridge and external systems remain unchanged.
